schema.description: Contains a list of all available FedCM providers.

client_id.description: The RP's client identifier, issued by the IdP.

config_url.description: A full path of the IdP config file.

domain_hint.description:
By specifying one of domain_hints values provided by the accounts endpoints,
the FedCM dialog selectively shows the specified account.

fields.description:
Array of strings that specifies the user information ("name", " email",
"picture") that RP needs IdP to share with them.

Note: Field API is supported by Chrome 132 and later.

login_hint.description:
By specifying one of login_hints values provided by the accounts endpoints,
the FedCM dialog selectively shows the specified account.

nonce.description:
A random string to ensure the response is issued for this specific request.
Prevents replay attacks.

parameters.description:
Custom object that allows to specify additional key-value parameters:
scope: A string value containing additional permissions that RP needs to
request, for example " drive.readonly calendar.readonly"
nonce: A random string to ensure the response is issued for this specific
request. Prevents replay attacks.

Other custom key-value parameters.

Note: parameters is supported from Chrome 132.

schema.title: CreateFedcmFlowResponse

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).
